title: 学級委員長の、名に懸けて！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, I receive a notification on my
phone, and just as I'm about to look at it...
I've found the cleat!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hold up! Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something rams into me from behind at incredible
speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh no! I'm so sorry for tackling you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Forgive her! Bakushin O's heart of justice was
burning with passion at the thought of catching a
criminal!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Somebody stole one of my classmate's cleats! As
class rep, I couldn't overlook it!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
These kinds of incidents keep happening all over
the academy... I too, as a hero of justice, am in
hot pursuit of the perpetrator!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: The most dastardly ne'er-do-well! A crow!
choice_data_list:
...Are you telling me you mistook me for a bird
when you tackled me?

...Are you telling me you mistook me for a bird
when you tackled me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no! That's not it! Your cellphone just looked
like the stolen cleat for a second!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I was so caught up in the moment, I even forgot
that the criminal was a crow!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But next time, I'll be certain to get the cleat back
from that naughty bird!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CAW! CAW!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There it is! It's got the cleat in its mouth and
everything! This time, I swear on my title as class
representative...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm not letting you get away!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't just the cleat, huh? This is the card game
that went missing too!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Ah! My shoe hammer! The crow took it! Thank
goodness it's back!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That crow is the master thief behind all the thefts
at the academy! Great job, Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh! Right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is a show of my Bakushin-fueled class
representative prowess!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text:
I'd expect no less of our Baku! That's our class rep
for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Bakushin O's fame grows even greater!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Thank you class rep! You got my cleat
back!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That crow will think twice before straying from
the straight and narrow again! With this, we have
protected the academy's peace!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And if it does act up again, then my rapid
legwork will set it straight as many times as need
be!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, feel free to keep relying on me in the
future!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole class is in an uproar over Sakura
Bakushin O's impressive achievements.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Agh?! Flying is totally unfair!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I let it get away. I'll have to work on my
Bakushin more...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But backing down now would only bring shame to
my title of class representative! What should I
do?
choice_data_list: Let's lure it out with a decoy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inspired by how she mistook my cellphone for a
cleat, we use it as a decoy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: GOT IT!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Thank you, Class Rep! You got my cleat
back!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That crow will think twice before straying from
the straight and narrow again! With this, we have
protected the academy's peace!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm the one who should thank you all! I
learned a valuable lesson!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's not enough to just rely on my Bakushin... It's
also important to devise a strategy sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears she made a breakthrough while looking
for a solution to the problem.
